title: Meta (META) sets a new all-time high in 2027
question_text: Will Meta Platforms' share price (NASDAQ: META) set a new all-time high (trade above its prior all-time high) at any point during calendar year 2027 (Jan 1 - Dec 31, 2027)?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if META trades intraday above its prior all-time high on any regular NASDAQ session in calendar 2027, where the prior all-time high is META's highest-ever intraday price as continuously updated (currently ~$796, Aug 2025; if META sets higher highs before 2027, YES requires exceeding those). Resolves NO if META never exceeds its running all-time high during 2027.
resolution_source: NASDAQ intraday price via a market-data provider (yfinance / stooq)
edge_cases: Intraday touch counts (not just closing). Regular sessions only. A new ATH set in 2026 does NOT resolve this YES (must occur in 2027, exceeding the running ATH). If META executes a split, compare on a split-adjusted basis. Delisting/acquisition at an implied price above the running ATH resolves YES.
